meaning: n.欢乐的歌,颂歌,(尤指)圣诞节颂歌v.歌颂,欢唱 Carol 卡罗尔(女子名)
examples: Carol felt all alone in the world.
Carol fussed about getting me a drink.
One of the U.S. attorneys whose firing generated so much heat is Carol Lam of San Diego.
South Carolina Democratic Party Chair Carol Fowler took it further, saying Wilson disgraced his home state.
